programme.desc: With the Fire Nation on the brink of global domination, a young girl and her brother discover a 12-year old Airbender who reveals himself as the Avatar. Will this irresponsible kid accept his destiny in time to save the world?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: With the Fire Nation on the brink of global domination, a young girl and her brother discover a 12-year old Airbender who reveals himself as the Avatar. Will this irresponsible kid accept his destiny in time to save the world?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting for a hundred years.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Meanwhile, Zhao plans an attack and Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao’s Fire Navy fleet. In the heat of battle, Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn’t a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Zhao’s invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe’s defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help – but will he return in time to stop Zhao and prevent the destruction of the Water Tribe?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful “Avatar State” as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Joe Lopez is a paroled convict wanting to stay clean and mend his relationship with his family. Unfortunately, he is being pressured to use his safecracking skills to help a gang pull a job.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Drug dealers are being more active and brazen trying to sell their drugs. They target a high school and a teacher is killed when he tries to run the dealers off school grounds. The students decide they must take back their school.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A hit team targets a future wedding for two cops and their friends including the best man and maid-of-honor Alex Cahill.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex's life hangs in the balance after being shot by a criminal during her friend's wedding. The Rangers track down the team who attacked during the wedding. Walker keeps remembering how much Alex means to him.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A relative of Carlos Sandoval is falsely arrested for a crime and sent to prison. Alex and Walker prove his innocence, but before Hector is released, he witnesses a guard kill another prisoner who wants to blow the whistle on wrong-doing.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A criminal Walker arrested years ago is released from prison. But once out, goes back to a life of crime. Trivette goes undercover to infiltrate his gang and get evidence to arrest him again. Alex and Carlos help a teen stay out of gangs.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A company is dumping pollutants into the river where Indians children swim. The children start dying. A group of Cherokees decides to solve the problem themselves. The Rangers work with Sheriff Sam Coyote to find the evidence of the dumping.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When the drowned body of Rebecca Lewis is found washed up on a riverbank, her friend and Tibbs’ law school buddy, Mark Meyers is the prime suspect based on an eyewitness account. He’s arrested for murder, but Tibbs doesn’t think that Mark is guilty.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When a judge running for Congress refuses to grant his wife a divorce, she threatens to reveal a secret from his past that would ruin his chances for election. Then, she’s found dead as part of a failed robbery, and the judge claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Officer Wilson Sweet is accused of allegedly soliciting a bribe when he arrests Bob Pinkney, a shady car salesman, and his buddy Al Merck after they drunkenly crash an event honoring D.A. Gerard Darnelle and cause a disturbance when asked to leave.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A box of mutilated flowers and slashed photos drives pop-singer Shanda into a state of shock. After she collapses and her road tour grinds to a halt, Dr. Mark Sloan takes pity on Shanda and embarks on a search to find her mysterious stalker.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Still groggy from a visit to the dentist, Dr. Sloan is mystified when a noted fund-raiser dies while visiting his home. Adding to the confusion, the body mysteriously disappears before the police get there!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's free tickets to a friend's magic show become an invitation to murder when the magician mysteriously dies on stage in the middle of his escape act!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A romance in bloom is nipped in the bud when Steve's new girlfriend is charged with murder. An instructor of modern dance, Cindy is shocked to learn she's being charged with killing one of the owners of the studio where she works.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Surprise, surprise! While investigating the murder of a call-girl, Dr. Sloan is caught in the middle of a vice raid!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan becomes involved in more than politics when he accepts an invitation to attend an election campaign party. A face in a crowd of well-wishers awakens old memories for Mayor Ridgeway's wife, Lauren, with murderous results.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Always trying to help out a friend, Jack Stewart offers his support when a con-man acquaintance tries to straighten out his life. Instead, Jack's entwined in a mysterious fatal car accident investigation involving a posh health spa.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A tense situation erupts into a hotbed of chaos! While awaiting treatment from Dr. Sloan, convicted criminal John Dunbar unexpectedly jumps his guards and seizes a gun.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A devastating earthquake causes widespread damage and Dr. Sloan's hospital goes on emergency power. After the tremors stop, Mark's friend Martin Garfield is found dead in the ruins of his mansion nearby. Was it the earthquake or murder?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve's undercover waterfront surveillance causes city-wide panic. His suspect, a gangland hit man, has suddenly developed the plague!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Posing as a visiting missionary, Dr. Sloan goes undercover at a convent to reveal the location and contents of a most mysterious package - a parcel that brought its owner to a sudden, untimely death.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's double trouble for Dr. Sloan in this second season premiere. What could be worse than an IRS tax audit?

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: While confronting board members about embezzled charity funds, chairman Elton Malone mysteriously keels over dead. And, one by one, all of the suspects also wind up murdered--at each other's funerals!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When Dr. Sloan's wealthy womanizing patient, Robert Stroud, mysteriously disappears, Sloan uncovers a greedy plot hatched by the women in Stroud's life. It's a murderous plan ripe with blackmail and betrayal--and a shockingly twisted conclusion!

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Now you see it, now you don't. A despised lawyer turns up murdered at Community General and before the police can arrive, the body mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a tasty tale for the t.v. tabloids when Community General's most famous patient attractive t.v. star, Pamela, is caught on tape fleeing the murder scene of ex-husband number four.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: It's a strange twist of fate when millionaire William Bissell, checks into the hospital and stumbles upon his ex-lover, Nurse Jenny Morgan. After Bissell's found murdered by lethal injection, Jenny becomes the number one suspect.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: As a favor to a colleague, Dr. Sloan agrees to perform surgery on mafia kingpin Alfred Johnson. A supposed routine heart operation turns into an untimely death for The Don.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Kimchee gets conflicting dating advice from Jung and Shannon. Janet's outraged when she learns that Umma's sold off her childhood keepsakes.

programme.desc: When Sabrina is tricked into marrying a troll, only a prince – a.k.a. Harvey – can save her.

programme.desc: Sabrina's 17th birthday turns stressful when she has to start studying for her witch's license.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Divorce attorney Holly (Kristen Johnston) sets up newly single Stuart with also divorced roommates: Phil (Donald Faison) and Haskell (Wayne Knight). After a rocky start with Stuart, the unlikely team helps him come to terms with his new unmarried life.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly's assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he's got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit because he used Phil's (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart's favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil's ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn't speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly (Kristen Johnston) has to face her cheating ex fiancé for the first time since they broke up, she enlists the guys' help to prove to him he lost the best thing he ever had.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde preps perfect prime rib, lobster in chili sauce, charred green beans, & cheddar-stuffed rolls.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde serves up shrimp cocktail, breaded clams, king crab with butter, and a mango frozen daiquiri.

programme.title: All Up In My Grill
programme.desc: Chef Dale Talde makes loaded hot dogs, spiced potato salad, chorizo crusted corn, & banana pudding pops.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber is shocked when Gary asks her to move onto his property. Catelynn pursues a career in microblading while Mackenzie accepts a job opportunity in Florida. Bentley starts therapy and Maci is heartbroken when she finds out he feels neglected.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: When Mackenzie's father needs to have quadruple bypass surgery, her plans to move to Florida are put on pause. Maci worries about Bentley's performance in school while Catelynn and Tyler contemplate having another child.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci helps Bentley decide if he should go to his brother, Jagger's birthday since Ryan will be there. Catelynn and Tyler work on discipling Nova while Amber makes a decision about living on Gary's property.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn believes she's pregnant while Maci deals with a change in venue for Jagger's birthday party which puts Bentley in an awkward position. Cheyenne considers buying a new house with Zach.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber deals with online trolls who criticize her weight while Catelynn receives her microblading certification and looks into opening her own studio. To raise awareness during PCOS month, Maci accepts a challenge from Taylor.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: After discovering that a staff member at Nova's old daycare is a sex offender, Catelynn and Tyler decide to talk to Nova about protecting herself. Mackenzie struggles starting her new job in Florida and taking care of the kids without Josh.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Zach's families pressure them to get married while Mackenzie and Josh give their marriage another chance in Florida. For the first time ever, Catelynn and Tyler decide to vote in the Presidential Election.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne shocks Cory with her pregnancy news. Amber struggles when her dog's health is deteriorates and Catelynn and Tyler are concerned that Nova might have a learning disability. Mackenzie celebrates her 26th birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: As Maci copes with the aftermath of the shooting, Cheyenne uses her platform to discuss racial injustice. Mackenzie's friends come to visit her in Florida and question her rekindled marriage. Catelynn and Tyler get news that his sister has relapsed.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne is nervous for the results of Zach's genetic test that will determine whether their unborn child will have VLCAD. After not going to Leah's birthday party, Amber tries to repair the damage caused by her absence.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Zach have a gender reveal party and finally get the results of Zach's genetic test. Maci is shocked to learn that Ryan had a session with Bentley's therapist. Mackenzie pushes Josh to move to Florida permanently while Amber seeks advice.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler are shocked when they find out the gender of their baby with an at-home test. Mackenzie goes home to Oklahoma to surprise her dad and finds out he's still struggling with depression.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Heading into her 3rd trimester, Cheyenne needs Cory to help out more with Ryder but he has other plans. Catelynn is hesitant but Tyler wants to try ketamine therapy. Mackenzie and her family celebrate her late mother's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber wants to pursue a college degree in Psychology. Mackenzie and Josh seek professional help for Broncs. Catelynn tries to understand Tyler's ketamine treatment. Cheyenne is devastated when her sister decides to move to DC.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo les explican a los Reyes que se quedan en la hacienda ante el peligro que se cierne sobre Gabriela. Fernando contrata como mayordomos a dos antiguos enemigos de los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Leonidas vuelve a ofender a Ruth y Juan la defiende, pero Óscar impide que su hermano lo golpee porque es el médico que atendió a Jimena, Leonidas pide perdón, Eva encara a Raquel sobre Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo desconfían de Malcolm y Carmela, los nuevos empleados de Fernando, porque eran los antiguos mayordomos de Eduvina. Martín defiende a Dominga de las arbitrariedades de Carmela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín insulta a Carmela, ella y Malcolm se dan cuenta de que el abuelo es un obstáculo en su camino, Norma trata de abrirle los ojos a Gabriela. Rosario visita la hacienda y se pelea con Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Un nuevo pistolero intenta asesinar a Juan, Óscar reconoce el carro y lo siguen hasta la hacienda de Gabriela, donde se produce un enfrentamiento, Fernando encubre al autor de los ataques.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hombres armados custodian la hacienda de los Reyes día y noche. Carmela sigue su plan y finge un desmayo para que despidan a Dominga, por quien surge una guerra entre Martín y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: A pesar de la vigilancia, Dínora entra en la hacienda de los Reyes y le dispara a Juan, quien la denuncia. Dominga comienza a trabajar con los Reyes, se avecinan nuevos problemas amorosos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela desautoriza a Malcolm en el manejo de las pesebreras y reduce sus atribuciones, las Elizondo ganan terreno en la hacienda. Norma presiente que alguien las vigila en la oscuridad.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm sospecha que hay una mujer oculta en un cuarto, Martín la ve. Los Reyes tratan de convencer a las Elizondo para que dejen a Gabriela, pero Sara se niega al conocer el plan de Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Jimena vigila a Fernando y lo sigue a la caballeriza, Malcolm se interpone en su camino, pero ella consigue una pista. Armando le ofrece a Fernando un apartamento para esconder a Dínora.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando se aficiona a las apuestas, a Gabriela no le gusta pero acepta bajo presión. Rosario ve a Armando besar a Dínora, él le echa la culpa a ella y se alegra de que su mujer esté celosa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando trata de violar a Jimena en el campo y Sara se lo impide. Ante las quejas de las Elizondo, Gabriela respalda a su esposo y llama calumniadoras a sus hijas. Rosario acosa a Franco.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar le da su merecido a Fernando, quien pone a Gabriela a elegir entre él y sus hijas, las hermanas convencen a Jimena de que se mude, Armando le pide a Rosario que no vuelva a la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le advierte a Belinda que no revele su paradero, pero Martín ya sabe que ella visita la hacienda. Los Reyes organizan la bienvenida a Jimena, Franco les regala a ella y Óscar una casa.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: When the race continues in Namibia, a flat tire deflates one team's hopes of leading the pack and the dreaded Double U-Turn returns.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the final five teams race to Amsterdam and take a dip in a floating hot tub in search of their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final five teams travel to Peru, where the Race gets physical and teams use their fitness trackers to help find their next clue. Also, Blair and Hayley's communication issues reach a boiling point.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In the penultimate leg, the final four teams race through Peru for a spot in the finale and a chance at the $1 million prize.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Everything is bigger in Texas, including THE AMAZING RACE season finale! With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race from Peru to Dallas, where they go to great heights at the top of AT&T Stadium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven new teams take off on the journey of a lifetime from Venice Beach, Calif. and head for Rio de Janeiro, where teams take a thrilling helicopter ride and face a huge decision at the Fast Forward.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the birthplace of Pope Francis, where they visit the church where he was baptized. Also, Racers are driven up a wall when they learn a tango with a twist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Attention to detail is paramount during a meaty challenge and one team faces a penalty after a costly mistake.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As Racers soar high above the breathtaking Victoria Falls toward a double U-turn, Team Texas uses their express pass in the hopes of eliminating The Green Team.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams conquer their fears in Zambia, Africa when they plunge more than 250 feet over the Zambezi River, feed a trio of crocodiles and walk with lions through the jungle.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Paris where Racers soar high above the French countryside and "drop mics" with a popular French rapper.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One Team risks falling to the back of the pack after taking a break to sight-see, and Racers take a big jump when faced with a Double Dutch Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams hit the town in Krakow, Poland with local street musicians to earn a hard day's pay.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With only six teams remaining, the competition heats up when Racers face a U-Turn, and some teams enjoy the sweet taste of victory after a candy making challenge.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is convinced that Opie's piggy bank is safer than the Mayberry bank-and sets out to prove his point.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie must either learn how to box or lose prestige among his peers when a new boy moves into town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney gives a parking ticket to the Governor's car, and refuses to tear it up.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A car containing a high-powered businessman breaks down in low-powered Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife is sure that a Main Street gun duel is in the offing when an ex-con comes to town.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Mayberry fears disaster when the sheriff discovers that a farmer's goat has eaten a good-sized meal of dynamite.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney look forward to seeing their high school sweethearts when the Mayberry Class of '45 holds a reunion.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A poor farmer successfully auditions to sing at a concert. Barney and Andy take it upon themselves to spruce him up for the event.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie meets a spoiled youngster and decides his own allowance should be tripled.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy uses common sense and Barney uses modern criminal detection methods to solve several burglaries at a filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff's knowledge of American history is put to the test by Opie and an attractive new history teacher.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee falls for the sales pitch of a fast-talking medicine man and his Indian elixir.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: The sheriff has his hands full as a clan of mountain musicians descend on Mayberry to meet a bus.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An English tourist works off his reckless driving fine by being a valet and chauffeur for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie suffers from puppy love so Barney attempts to show him how to handle women.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney decides that it's time to push Andy into matrimony, but Barney's marriage bureau collapses at a frantic dinner party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A pack of hunting dogs overruns the Mayberry Courthouse just as Andy is trying to impress a visiting state official.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Howard Morris guest stars as Ernest T. Bass as the Darling clan returns to Mayberry with its own kind of mountain trouble.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife becomes super-efficient in executing his duties as a deputy sheriff after two thieves are jailed in Mayberry until their accomplices are captured.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a bird with a slingshot and becomes foster-mother to her three young birds.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, Barney and Gomer are a trio of laughs as they tread the boards of a haunted house.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Guest star Howard Morris plays the part of a mountain man very disgruntled with being rejected by the army.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher urges the residents of Mayberry to relax and enjoy the simple pleasures of life--leading to more work for all.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee is the unwilling object of matrimony when mountaineer Briscoe Darling comes a'courting.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gossiping Gomer Pyle moves in with the sheriff when he loses his job and home at the filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ron Howard's real-life father and younger brother appear as Mayberry gets involved with a gold shipment en route to Fort Knox.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross on a painting excursion along this beautiful scenic river - who knows what abundance of nature's wealth lies beyond!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Team up with Bob Ross and travel back to the days of swimming in that lovely secluded river bend; bring back memories of a forgotten time.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine the peace and serenity of a home in the hollow, sheltered from the snow-covered mountains beyond! Travel with Bob Ross to just such a place.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel with Bob Ross to a picturesque spot in the meadow and delight in the discovery of not one, but two serene fishing holes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Feast your eyes on this colorful Bob Ross display of nature's exciting seashore panarama … beautifully tucked within an oval.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Melting snow from the mountains creates a rushing flow of water into a valley just awakening for spring. Feel the crisp new season with Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts and the procedures they use to solve murders and other mysteries in minutes or centuries after they happen.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Killers often attempt to deflect attention away from their crimes by hiding the remains of their victims. Bodies may lay hidden for years before they are discovered.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne ve a Glenn y Maggie buscando provisiones, pero alguien más los observa: Merle, quien reconoce a Glenn como uno de los que le abandonó, a merced de los zombis, en una azotea de Atlanta. Entretanto, Rick sigue mentalmente inestable.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne conduce a Rick, Daryl y Oscar a Woodbury para rescatar a Glenn y Maggie, a quienes el Gobernador está torturando para sonsacarles dónde se oculta el grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick invade Woodbury con la intención de rescatar a Glenn y Maggie. Michonne descubre el secreto familiar que oculta el Gobernador cuando trata de asesinarlo. En la prisión, un grupo desconocido atraviesa la verja de seguridad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de la batalla contra el Gobernador, Rick y Carl encuentran una casa en la que Rick intenta reponerse de sus graves heridas y Carl sale en busca de alimentos. Mientras, Michonne trata de encontrarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En secreto, el Gobernador y sus hombres preparan una incursión mortal contra la prisión. Darryl y Merle lleguen en mitad de la contienda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador permite a Andrea, acompañada de Milton, ir a la prisión a negociar la paz con su antiguo grupo. Mientras, Tyreese y Sasha llegan a Woodbury y le ofrecen al Gobernador información sobre la prisión a cambio de poder quedarse allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Michonne y Carl viajan al condado de Rick en busca de armamento y encuentran a alguien a quien creían muerto. Durante la misión, Rick cambia la percepción que tiene de Michonne.

programme.title: Ray Mancini vs Orlando Romero
programme.desc: On September 15th, 1983 Ray Mancini fought Orlando Romero for the WBA World Lightweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York with the bout ending in the ninth round by knockout earning Mancini the win.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Bert Cooper
programme.desc: On August 5th, 1990 Ray Mercer faced Bert Cooper for Heavyweight titles at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City with the bout ending by unanimous decision in favor of Mercer.

programme.title: Ray Mercer vs Tommy Morrison
programme.desc: On October 18th, 1991 Ray Mercer faced Tommy Morrison for the WBO World Heavyweight titles at the Convention Center in Atlantic City ending in technical knockout by Mercer earning him the victory and title but, he relinquished the title shortly after.

programme.title: Rob Brant vs Ryota Murata 1
programme.desc: On October 20th, 2018 Rob Brant faced Ryota Murata for a second time for the WBA World Middleweight title at the Park Theater in Las Vegas that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Brant.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Abraham Nova
programme.desc: On June 18th, 2022, Robeisy Ramirez and Abraham Nova fought for the IBF USBA & WBO Global Featherweight titles at Madison Square Garden resulting in a knockout victory for Robeisy Ramirez.

programme.title: Robeisy Ramirez vs Brandon Valdes
programme.desc: On December 12th, 2020, Robeisy Ramirez fought Brandon Valdes in a featherweight bout in The Bubble at MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Ramirez showed his impressive speed and natural power, stopping Valdes in the sixth round.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Davey Moore
programme.desc: On June 16th, 1983 Roberto Duran fought Davey Moore for the WBA World Super welterweight title at Madison Square Garden in New York Moore was knocked down in the 7th round giving the win to Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Iran Barkley
programme.desc: On February 24th, 1989, Roberto Duran fought Iran Barkley for the WBC Middleweight Title in Atlantic City. Duran, known for his relentless aggression, defeated Barkley by a close split decision in what was named The Ring Fight of the Year for 1989.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Jimmy Batten
programme.desc: On November 12th, 1982 Roberto Duran faced Jimmy Batten at the Orange Bowl in Miami, Fl. It ended in an unanimous decision victory for Duran.

programme.title: Roberto Duran vs Sugar Ray Leonard 1
programme.desc: On December 7th, 1989 Roberto Duran and Sugar Ray Leonard fought for the first time for the WBC World Super Middleweight at the Mirage Hotel in Las Vegas resulting in a unanimous decision win for Leonard.

programme.title: Roman Gonzalez vs. Juan Francisco Estrada 1
programme.desc: On November 17th, 2012, Roman Gonzalez fought Juan Francisco Estrada for the WBA World Light Flyweight Title at the Sports Arena in Los Angeles. In a successful title defense fight, Gonzalez earned the unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs James Toney
programme.desc: On November 18th, 1994, Roy Jones Jr fought James Toney for the IBF Super Middleweight Title at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Jones displayed his exceptional athleticism and speed, outclassing Toney to win a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Ryota Murata vs Rob Brant 2
programme.desc: On July 12th, 2019 Ryota Murata participated in a rematch with Rob Brant for the WBA World Middleweight title at the EDION Arena Osaka in Japan resulting in a second round knockout securing the win for Murata.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin plays chess by mail with Boris, who is living in Alaska. Paladin receives what he assumes is Boris' next move but instead is a request for help.

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Have Gun Will Travel

programme.title: Tombstone Territory

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Clay Hollister (Pat Conway) goes undercover as prisoner Bert Taggert in order to prevent Mexican bandit chief Juan Diega from robbing the Tombstone bank in order to finance his revolutionaries. But then the real Taggert shows up.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) must collect taxes from Galeyville - a nest of outlaws headed by notorious gunman Curly Bill Brocious (Robert Foulk) - which lies in Tombstone Territory. It's a mission he views as leading to an almost certain death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: After an outlaw escapes from a stagecoach killing, Editor Claibourne spearheads a drive in Tombstone to raise a $5,000 reward for his capture, but this may cause problems for Sheriff Hollister who must also now deal with greedy bounty hunters.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Cattleman Sam Brewster's men stop in Tombstone overnight while driving a herd through Arizona. Brewster's son starts blowing off steam, and Sheriff Hollister's deputy is forced to shoot him. Enraged, Brewster threatens to avenge his son's death.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: After killing a man in self-defense in the town of Galeno, Sheriff Hollister (Pat Conway) finds himself hauled before a kangaroo court for trial on a murder charge, the penalty of which is death. An unexpected ally comes to Hollister's defense.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Raoul de Moreney -- a slick card shark and fortune hunter -- comes to Tombstone in search of quick riches. His vicious greed nettles the editor of the Epitaph and, in a flush of anger, the two men agree to a duel…but de Moreney is a deadly duelist.

programme.title: Tombstone Territory
programme.desc: Gunslinger Jake Hoyt plots a radical means of rising to power in Tombstone -- by snatching the sheriff's job away from Clay Hollister. To succeed, Hoyt plans to outshine Hollister as a sharpshooter. The result is inevitable: a dramatic showdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's friend versus friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi. The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi's life points, Yugi can't bring himself to attack his dear friend. Yugi summons Joey's favorite monster Red-Eyes Black Dragon to bring Joey back to his senses.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik's spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: There's only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea. Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz's zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City finals. But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City finals begin! The eight finalists have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the first duel of the Battle City finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring who possessed Bakura. Yugi quickly disposes of Bakura's grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns. If that's not bad enough, Bakura's Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi's Life Points every time Yugi attacks. Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi's trapped.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster. Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals or will he surrender to save Bakura's life?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed. The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion's strategy.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion's Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey's monsters and his Life Points. Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a feeding frenzy as Odion's Mystical Beast Selket devours Joey's monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Selket when it ingests Joey's monsters whenever they're summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster, The Winged Dragon of Ra, targeted to annihilate the rest of Joey's Life Points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it's a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing Life Points equals losing your memories.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Mai loses more memories under Marik's relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends' never-ending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik's The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she's unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities. Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City finals, Kaiba's mystery opponent is Ishizu. With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel: she will defeat Kaiba with sacrifice's blast! How can Kaiba win when it's predestined that he will lose? Kaiba must change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik's evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and Millennium Ring, with the loser being trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever. To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm. But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba's blimp is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen - five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba's past who are out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley's Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Yugi struggles to make heads or tails of the Deck Master System, Big 1 uses his Deck Master ability to send all of Yugi's attacks right back! How can Yugi defeat an opponent when his attacks take away his own life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi's running out of life points, but can his cute little Deck Master Kuriboh unleash his furry fury to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After finding out their old captor, Nora, is being released from jail, the iCarly kids try to halt her release, but decide to allow it. They then return to her house, but will they make it out again?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly catches a contagious illness and accidentally gets a member of the band, One Direction, sick. Meanwhile, Spencer is stuck training a little girl who dislikes exercising.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: With Sam's help, Gibby opens a secret restaurant in the school's basement. Meanwhile, Spencer designs a security robot for the loft which goes unexpectedly haywire.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly and Spencer are being evicted from their apartment, and the gang reminisces about their time in Bushwell Plaza. Although, their memories may not be quite how we remember them.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's new dream job becomes a nightmare when Sam gets hired too! Meanwhile, Carly tries to get a clueless guy to ask her out, and Spencer has to volunteer at the local firehouse.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The iCarly gang celebrate 'Halfoween' because they think Halloween is so great that it should come twice a year! But when Nevel pulls a prank on Carly and her friends, the party spins out of control.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer has a new nemesis - Chuck's more menacing younger brother, Chip! Meanwhile, Freddie fixes Gibby's toy phaser and gives it a power he never imagined!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly bans T-Bo from the loft, he retaliates by not letting Carly into the Groovy Smoothie. Meanwhile, Freddie and Gibby discover being in a band has many perks and a few drawbacks.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam learns her mom is in a Vegas jail, the gang decides to gather their most prized possessions, drive to Vegas and pawn their stuff to make enough money to bail her out.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Sam's friend gets out of juvy and Sam warns everyone to stay away, but Carly doesn't listen and finds herself in over her head. Back at the loft, Spencer finds a pair of night vision goggles.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam's laptop gets stolen, the iCarly gang tries to help track down the thief.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly wants her dad to escort her to an important dance, but when he can't make it a very sick Spencer tries to help her out. Meanwhile, Sam fixes a motorcycle and Freddie gets a new phone.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: After Jimmy Fallon mentions iCarly on his late night show, the gang does a tribute webcast to him. Jimmy sees it and invites them to New York to appear on his show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Spencer accidentally sets fire to Carly's presents, she wishes that she had a normal brother. A Christmas angel shows Carly what her life would be like.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The Cast introduces bloopers and outtakes from the series.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly suspects that her new boyfriend, Steven, is cheating on her with Tori Vega, so the gang plans a trip to Los Angeles to catch him in the act at a party thrown by Andre at Kenan Thompson's house.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: iCarly gets invited to be guests of honor at WebiCon, but when the fans start asking questions that are too personal, things quickly gets out of hand. Spencer does battle with a costumed nemesis.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly jokes on the web show that she can beat up Shelby Marx, the best female fighter in the world, Shelby challenges Carly to an exhibition match.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When the iCarly gang have two up-and-coming web comedians on the web show, they learn that the boys' next video needs to be a big hit. And Carly and Sam quickly learn that their fighting is making it very hard to keep doing the web show.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Carly jokes on the web show that she can beat up Shelby Marx, the best female fighter in the world, Shelby challenges Carly to an exhibition match.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Spencer freaks out when Carly starts dating a hot new guy with a bad reputation. And when Carly discovers that her new boyfriend has a shocking secret, she realizes that he may not the "bad boy" she thought he was.
